name: Islamic Republic of Iran — Strategic Leadership KPV Assessment (Open Source)
description: Open-source KPV assessment of Iranian strategic leadership with emphasis on nuclear programme and IRGC architecture. AO INVERTED. All data from public sources: IAEA reports, ISN, INSS, Wilson Center, CRS, NTI, Bellingcat, ISS.
ao_note: INVERTED AO: High AO = visible to allied OSINT/IAEA inspections. Low AO = significant intelligence gap.

roles.title: Ayatollah Khamenei — Supreme Leader
roles.notes: Supreme Leader authority over nuclear fatwa, IRGC, and Quds Force. Succession architecture (Assembly of Experts) exists but transition path highly uncertain given factionalism. KPCI=12. Source: Iranian Constitution (public); CRS R44017.

roles.title: IRGC Commander-in-Chief (General Salami)
roles.notes: Salami publicly identified; sanctioned. IRGC command relationships and missile programme oversight. Source: OFAC SDN (public); IISS Military Balance; CRS RL32048.

roles.title: IRGC Quds Force Commander (General Qaani)
roles.notes: Post-Soleimani. Proxy network relationship management is the highest-DR role in Iranian architecture — specific cell relationships, intermediary networks, financial channels. Source: OFAC SDN; CRS R46981; ISS.

roles.title: Director, Atomic Energy Organisation of Iran
roles.notes: AEOI Director publicly identified; IAEA interlocutor. Enrichment programme oversight. Source: IAEA safeguards reports (public quarterly); AEOI public announcements; CRS RL34544.

roles.title: SPND Nuclear Weapons Design Programme Director
roles.notes: SIGNIFICANT INTELLIGENCE GAP: AO=2.0. SPND (Organization of Defensive Innovation and Research) warhead design lead. Fakhrizadeh (assassinated 2020) was the canonical holder; current successor is substantially unknown. This is the Israeli KPV targeting precedent case. Source: Albright/ISIS SPND analysis; IAEA PMD documentation; NTI Iran profile.

roles.title: Natanz / Fordow Enrichment Operations Director
roles.notes: Centrifuge cascade operational management. IAEA inspection access provides partial visibility. Source: IAEA quarterly safeguards reports (public); ISIS analyses.

roles.title: IRGC Aerospace Force Commander (Hajizadeh)
roles.notes: Hajizadeh publicly identified; sanctioned. Ballistic missile and UAV programme. Shahed-136 drone design knowledge. Source: OFAC SDN; CSIS missile defence project; CRS R46510.

roles.title: IRGC Cyber Command Director
roles.notes: INTELLIGENCE GAP: AO=2.0. APT33/34/35 attributed to IRGC/MOIS at entity level; operational directors opaque. Source: FireEye APT33/34 reports; CISA AA22-055A (public).

roles.title: Secretary, Supreme National Security Council
roles.notes: SNSC coordination; nuclear decision authority delegation. Publicly identified role. Source: Iranian Constitution; CRS R44017.
